56713.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
56713.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

56714.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
56714.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

56715.title: Forever 80s
56715.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

56716.title: 40 Sad Songs From The 80s
56716.description: You're going to need a full box of tissues for this playlist as we bring you 40 of the saddest songs from the 80s!

56718.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
56718.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV!

56719.title: ... So 80s!
56719.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
